steps.t: Tham Lumren is in the north-east Angle. You should look for Thalathril at the the Elven camp, Tham Lumren.
Tham Lumren is in the north-east Angle. Merileg has asked you to bring a report to Tham Lumren, but the way is guarded. You should speak to the guards…
Thalathril is near the large tent in the Elven camp. You should speak to Thalathril.
